compiled_state.title: CI workflow on main is failing pre-existing
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation (2026-03-29): CI Python Skills workflow fails with 12 intentional RED tests (444 passed, 12 failed). All 12 are TDD RED tests awaiting GREEN implementation: 7 in test_project_setup_ci_autodetection.py (task dso-bwtp), 5 in test_brainstorm_gap_analysis.py (gap analysis feature). These are not regressions. Fix: implement the corresponding GREEN tasks, or exclude RED-marked tests from CI via .test-index markers.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation (2026-03-30): All 12 CI failures are intentional TDD RED tests awaiting GREEN implementation (7 in test_project_setup_ci_autodetection.py for task dso-bwtp, 5 in test_brainstorm_gap_analysis.py for gap analysis feature). These are not regressions — they are RED markers in .test-index. CI will pass once the corresponding GREEN tasks complete.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
